arts.ttl: Analysts feel Liverpool star needed Arne Slot influence – Now the best in the world
arts.sum: Liverpool star Virgil van Dijk may have needed Arne Slot’s arrival at the club to help get back to his best. That’s according to analysts Anso Jansen and Kees Luijckx via Voetbal Primeur, who believes Slot’s influence has turned the Liverpool captain into the best in the world once again. Van Dijk has been imperious The post Analysts feel Liverpool star needed Arne Slot influence – Now the best in the world appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Everton v Liverpool Merseyside derby postponed due to Storm Darragh
arts.sum: Match postponed due ‘to the risk to safety in the local area due to strong wind gusts’, Everton statement reads The Merseyside derby, scheduled to kick off at Goodison Park at 12.30pm today, has been postponed due to the impact of Storm Darragh. Winds of up to 70mph and severe weather conditions have resulted in travel disruption in and around Merseyside and presented a risk a safety. A decision to postpone the game between Everton and Liverpool was taken at 8.30am on Saturday. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Steven Gerrard thinks Liverpool have a player 'more talented' than he was
arts.sum: One midfield ace continues to impress for Liverpool under Arne Slot, and Steven Gerrard has gone as far as saying the 23-year-old is more talented than he ever was
